title: EpicTech: Slimefun Chronicles
description:
Slimefun is a spigot server plugin provides magic and technology.

It makes Slimefun items cooler and more beautiful!
body:
# Slimefun Resource Pack

Slimefun is a Spigot server plugin that provides both magic and technology elements. This resource pack enhances the visual appeal of Slimefun items, making them more impressive and visually appealing.

## Features
- Easily distinguishable items
- Simple and clean GUI

![Original armors and elytras](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/765/58/magical.png)

![Armors](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/765/78/armors.png)

## Compatibility
This resource pack is designed for the Slimefun 4 Plugin. To enable its features, the Custom Item Textures (CIT) function is utilized. Optifine is a prerequisite for the proper functioning of this resource pack. Download Optifine [here](https://optifine.net/downloads).

For Fabric platform users, compatible mods include:
- [Optifabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)
- [CIT Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn)
- [Animatica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/animatica)

## Note
While tests have been conducted with various Optifine and CIT Resewn versions, there may still be some remaining bugs. Feel free to share your questions or requests in the comments section!
